int.label: 'Use passkey on a different device' link

enum.name: BiometricAuthenticationStatusWin
enum.summary: Status of biometric authentication availability on Windows.

int.label: For some reason availability can't be checked or has an unknown status.
A biometric verifier device is available.
The biometric verifier device is performing an operation and is unavailable.
Group policy has disabled the biometric verifier device.
There is no biometric verifier device available.
A biometric verifier device is not configured for this user.
User saved the original password generated by Chrome
Login happened on an insecure origin
Login happened on a secure origin
Character class was absent and is added
All characters belonging to the class are removed
Set of character class members changed
Edit username and password and save

enum.name: CredentialManagerAPIError
enum.summary: Numeric values correspond to CredentialManagerStatusCodes class.

int.label: Backend downstream implementation is not available
Empty credential, auto sign-in FRE pending
Empty credential, called in incognito mode
(DEPRECATED in M111) Empty credential, called in autofill-assistant mode
Password hash change event where the GSuite/Gmail account is not syncing
Password hash change event where the account is a non-GAIA enterprise account
Url override was not fetched yet
Url override was available and used
Url override was available in the FacetGroup and used
Could not find consumer for exporting
Screen lock is not set up

enum.name: HttpPasswordMigrationMode
enum.int: HTTP credentials were moved during migration to HTTPS
HTTP credentials were copied during migration to HTTPS

int.label: Only values from JavaScript, and no user focus
Only values from JavaScript, and user focus
Encryption is available but invalid entries exist in the database

enum.name: LoginsChangedTrigger
enum.summary: Triggers that may indirectly cause PasswordStore observers notifications because logins *may* have changed.
enum.int: Chrome either was notified about external changes (e.g. via subscription notification) or started a new foregrounding session and needs to refresh data that may have changed due to external credential management.
A credential was saved by Chrome. Update observers with all credentials because the addition may conflict with an existing credential.

A credential was updated by Chrome. Update observers with all credentials because updates may have caused implicit removals (e.g. due to primary key changes) or the update may have failed (e.g. because of a prior deletion).
A single credential was removed by Chrome. Update observers with all credentials because removal might fail (i.e. credential was already gone).
Multiple credentials where removed by Chrome. Update observers with all credentials because removals might fail.
Chrome removed blocklisting entries. Update observers with all credentials to confirm the remaining saving exceptions.

int.label: Password Generation Prompt in Autofill Dropdown
(DEPRECATED - 12/22) Link after successful automated password change

enum.name: MigrationToOSCryptEnum
enum.summary: Display migration status of LoginDatabase to OSCrypt on IOS.

int.label: Migration failed: can't copy password_value column
Migration failed: can't read password from keychain
Migration failed: can't encrypt password with OSCrypt
Migration failed: can't update password value
Migration failed: can't delete missing password from the database
Opened automatically / Offering a password to save
Opened manually / Offering a password to save
Opened automatically / Confirming generated password saved
Opened automatically / Offering a credential to choose (obsolete)
Opened manually / Offering a password to update
Opened automatically / Offering a password to update
Opened manually / Confirming generated password saved
Opened automatically / Offering to save unsynced passwords locally
Opened automatically / Notification about compromised passwords
Opened automatically / Offering to move profile password to account store
Opened manually / Offering to enable biometric authentication before filling
Opened automatically / Offering to enable biometric authentication before filling
Opened automatically / Confirming biometric authentication before filling is enabled
Opened automatically / Notifying the user about incoming shared passwords
Opened a site to change password manually
(DEPRECATED IN M111) Started an automated password change flow
Sign in with another WebAuthn device
The user selected password export option
Password export dismissed by the user
Password export confirmed by the user
Local heuristics found sign up form
Generated popup shown (limit once per page)
Editing popup shown (limit once per page)
Generation item in the context menu accepted
Generation item in the context menu shown
Google Password Manager link clicked in the bubble footer
User moved or closed the tab, or closed the browser.
Grouped matches exist among other matches

enum.name: PasswordManager.MoveToAccountStoreTrigger
enum.summary: Triggers that will cause Chrome to offer to move a password from the profile store to the account store.
enum.int: The user successfully logged in with a password from the profile store. Recorded only on Win/Mac/Linux.
The user explicitly asked to move a password listed in Settings. Recorded only on iOS.
The user explicitly asked to move multiple passwords at once in Settings. Recorded only on Win/Mac/Linux.
After saving a password locally, the user opted in to saving this and future passwords in the account. Recorded only on Win/Mac/Linux.

int.label: Not family member: 'Got it' button clicked
Not family member: 'Create a family group' clicked
No other family members: 'Got it' button clicked
No other family members: 'Invite family members' clicked
Family picker: 'Share' button clicked (1 member selected)
Family picker: 'Share' button clicked (>1 member selected)
Family picker: 'Share' button clicked (1 member selected)
Family picker: 'Share' button clicked (>1 member selected)
Family picker: Ineligible recipient 'Learn more' link clicked
Family promo: 'Create family group' link clicked
Family promo: 'Invite family members' link clicked
Credentials exist shared from same sender with same password
Credentials exist shared from same sender with different password
Credentials exist shared from different sender with same password
Credentials exist shared from different sender with different password
Credentials Service enabled by the user
Credentials Service enabled by recommended policy
Credentials Service disabled by the uer
Credentials Service disabled by recommended policy
Typed manually (i.e. filled from neither the account-scoped nor the profile-scoped store
Filled from both in the profile-scoped and the account-scoped store

enum.name: PasswordManagerHttpCredentialType
enum.summary: This enum records the type of a given HTTP credential. Depending on its username and the password, an HTTP credential can have no matching, an equivalent or a conflicting HTTPS credentials. Also the corresponding website can be served with or without HSTS enabled.

int.label: Chosen file exceeds max file size
Conflicts need to be resolved by the user.

enum.name: PasswordManagerMatchedFormType
enum.int: A credential exists for a PSL matched site but not for the current security origin.
A credential exists for an affiliated android app but not for the current security origin.
A credential exists for an affiliated site but not for the current security origin.

int.label: User clicked Add shortcut from the UI.
User switched profile in the standalone password manager app.

enum.name: PasswordManagerSyncingAccountState
enum.summary: The value is a combination of the current sync state and if the user has their sync password saved.

int.label: Not Syncing/Sync pasword saved. This value should not happen.
Bubble lost focus / No infobar interaction
The sheet was displaying content when it was closed.
An empty sheet was dismissed by user interaction
An empty sheet was dismissed without user interaction
A password was saved or updated
A credential was filled via touch to fill sheet
A credential was filled via keyboard accessory sheet
A credential was filled via keyboard accessory bar
A credential was filled via all passwords sheet
The more options button was clicked
The user chose to start syncing
The user chose to export passwords
The sheet with the introduction was dismissed
The sheet with more options was dismissed
The sheet without content was dismissed (Obsolete)
A new credential is added from settings, with the note field not empty
Note changed from empty to non-empty from the password edit dialog in settings
Note changed from non-empty to another non-empty value from the password edit dialog in settings
Note changed from non-empty to empty from the password edit dialog in settings

enum.name: PasswordNotesMigrationToOSCryptEnum
enum.summary: Display migration status of LoginDatabase to OSCrypt on IOS for notes.

int.label: Migration failed: can't read note from keychain
Migration failed: can't encrypt note with OSCrypt
Migration failed: can't update note value
Migration failed: can't delete missing note from the database
URL not valid for reputation computing
URL matched enterprise change password URL
Password Alert mode: no need to send ping
Country is excluded from Safe Browsing

enum.name: PasswordRequirementsFetcherResult

int.label: Found no spec for current origin
Found a spec for current origin

enum.int: The origin is an IP address, not HTTP/HTTPS, or not a valid URL.
Server responded with an empty document or an error code.
Server timed out.
Server responded with a document but it could not be parsed.
No URL loader configured.

int.label: Import dialog opened from the three-dot menu.
Import dialog opened from the empty passwords list.
Import flow canceled before the file selection.
UPM: View passwords clicked after successful import.
API was called without a context.
API was called without an account.
GMS Core version is not supported.
API was successfully called, but returned an error.
API was successfully called, but result is unknown.
Failed to create FacetId to obtain affiliated matches.
Generated password overridden by a non-generated one
Reading success but metadata cleaned for initial sync
Reading success but metadata cleaned to resolve inconsistencies in the cache of unsupported proto fields

Reading successful, but the browser has just been upgraded to a version that supports passwords notes. Therefore, the metadata are cleared to enforce the initial sync flow and download any potential passwords notes on the server
Reading successful, but suspicious bulk deletions were detected. To err on the side of safety, drop all password sync metadata and start again.
Credential row is clicked to open password view page
The user opens the password view page to view an existing credential.
The user opens the password view page to view an non-existing credential
Credential username, password or note edited
The password view page authentication timed out while the edit dialog is open
The password view page authentication timed out while the edit dialog is closed
The credential is requested by typing the URL.
Passkey copy display name button clicked

enum.name: PrefilledUsernameFillOutcome
enum.int: 1) the page has a username input element whose value was prefilled by the website itself. 2) the prefilled value was found in a list of known placeholder values (e.g. "username or email"). 3) the user had a credential stored and the field content was overridden with the username of this credential due to 2).

1) the page has a username input element whose value was prefilled by the website itself. 2) the prefilled value was NOT found in a list of known placeholder values (e.g. "username or email"). 3) the user had a credential stored and the field content was NOT overridden with the username of this credential due to 2).

enum.name: ProvisionalSaveFailure
enum.summary: Reason why a provisional save failed.

int.label: Clicked 'Save' or 'Update' in the edit dialog
Clicked Accept in username confirmation dialog
Clicked 'Cancel' in the edit dialog or dismissed the dialog
Clicked 'Never for this site' in the cog menu

enum.name: SingleUsernameVoteDataAvailability
enum.summary: Whether two existing single username detection mechanisms (UFF and FPF) have data, overlapping or not.

int.label: Both, and FPF data contains UFF candidate field.
Iframe with the same url as main frame
Iframe with different url and the same signon realm
Iframe with PSL matched signon realm
Iframe with different and not PSL matched signon realm
Was already dismissed max times, not shown
Already shown once for this page, not shown
